name: Allkem Limited
description: Allkem Limited is a specialty lithium chemicals company with a global portfolio of diverse, high-quality lithium assets. The company's operations include lithium brine and borax extraction in Argentina, hard-rock lithium mining in Australia, and a lithium hydroxide conversion facility in Japan. Allkem is dedicated to sustainably meeting the growing global demand for lithium, a key component in electric vehicle batteries and energy storage systems, through its low-cost, high-grade production facilities.
